      "question": "What is the main characteristic of a Nash equilibrium?",
      "options": ["A) Both players have the same payoffs", "B) One player's payoff is maximized", "C) No player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing their strategy", "D) The game must be zero-sum"],
      "correct": 2,
